description: SRT transcript with engineered silences yields cut candidates and proposed chapters
assertions: cut_candidates has exactly 3 entries with gap_seconds 12.5, 8.5, and 20.0
every proposed chapter has a basis of silence, wpm_drop, or both
chapter titles are named from transcript text only

description: minimal input (path only) applies default thresholds
assertions: min_gap_seconds defaults to 8.0 for chapter suggestion and is reported in output
output is valid against the SKILL.md contract

description: plain-text transcript with no timecodes degrades honestly
assertions: cut_candidates is empty or absent, never invented
output offers a topic-only outline clearly labeled as untimed

description: dense speech with no gaps at threshold returns empty candidates with a note
assertions: notes state no silences met the threshold
threshold is not lowered silently to force candidates
